data.name: EnlargeExpl
data.value: Enter amount to enlarge the lot, viewed from the front.

data.name: ShrinkExpl
data.value: Enter amount to enlarge or shrink the lot, viewed from the front.

data.name: Abort
data.value: The lot adjustment was aborted!

data.name: ExplainUserAbort
data.value: You have chosen not to continue with the lot adjustment.

data.name: ExplainShrinkAbort
data.value:
Invalid {0}: {1} is in an invalid location
Remove everything from the area to be trimmed, plus one additional tile at the edge of the new lot. Then rerun the LotAdjuster.

data.name: ExplainEmptyLotAbort
ExplainAbort
data.value:
The lot adjustment was aborted! An error occurred during modification of your lot. The current version of the LotAdjuster is unable to continue.
Please report this error at: http://www.modthesims.info/showthread.php?t=384656 and attach a copy of your lot to the posting.

data.name: Erfolg
data.value: The Lot was changed!

data.name: FinalExplWithMove
data.value:
The lot was changed. Complete the following steps to finish the process:
1) Start the game and load the neighbourhood. The lot may appear to be empty.
2) Load the lot and make at least one structural change. Save and return to the neighbourhood.
3) To regenerate the road, pick up the lot in the neighborhood view and move it until it "snaps" to the road.
4) You may need to edit the lot one more time: to delete excess road tiles and sidewalks, and to move the mailbox and garbage can.
The lot adjustment is complete and your modified lot is available for use.

data.name: FinalExplNoMove
data.value:
The lot was changed. Complete the following steps to finish the process:
1) Start the game and load the neighbourhood. The lot may appear to be empty.
2) Load the lot and make at least one structural change. Save and return to the neighbourhood.
3) DON'T move the lot in the neighborhood! If you do, the roads will be rebuilt.
The lot adjustment is complete and your modified lot is available for use.

data.name: FinalExplUnlock
data.value:
The LotAdjuster has completed the modification of your lot. Complete the following steps to finish the process:
1) Start the game and load the neighbourhood.
2) To fix the view of the lot in the neighborhood, load the lot and make at least one structural change. Save and return to the neighbourhood.
The lot adjustment is complete and your modified lot is available for use.

data.name: Corrupted
data.value:
Your lot may have been corrupted.
DO NOT SHARE this lot. EVER!

data.name: LotTitle
data.value: Choose a Lot:

data.name: TitleKeepStreet
data.value: Attention!

data.name: MessageKeepStreet
data.value: This is an unfinished Feature. You can use it to enlarge your lot on the other side of the street. After using this, don't replace the lot anymore. So you can't share it. Do you want to use this feature?

data.name: TitleMoveLot
data.value: Attention!

data.name: MessageMoveLot
data.value: This is an unfinished Feature. You can use it to move your lot in the neighborhood. After using this, don't replace the lot anymore. So you can't share it. Do you want to use this feature?

data.name: TitleNoChange
data.value: No value changed

data.name: MessageNoChange
data.value: You didn't change any of this Lot's Values. So the only effect is unlocking all tiles of the lot. Tiles will only remain unlocked until you replace the lot the next time. Is this your intention?

data.name: TitleTooManyTerrainPaints
data.value: Too Many Terrain Paints

data.name: MessageTooManyTerrainPaints
data.value: There are too many terrain paints on your lot. Would you like to have unused terrain paints removed?

data.name: MessageStillTooManyTerrainPaints
data.value: The LotAdjuster was not able to remove enough terrain paints. There are still too many terrain paints on your lot.

data.name: TitleWrongVer
data.value: WARNING! Unsupported Version.

data.name: MessageWrongVer
data.value:
Unsupported version: {0}.
The LotAdjuster only supports Expansion and Stuff Packs up to and including {1}.
Do you want to continue?

data.name: TitleOccupiedApartment
data.value: ERROR! Apartment Building is Occupied

data.name: MessageOccupiedApartment
data.value:
You cannot modify this lot.
When an apartment building is in use (occupied), the LotAdjuster cannot modify the lot.

data.name: TitleRoadElevation
data.value: WARNING!

data.name: MessageRoadElevation
data.value:
Road is no longer at a relative elevation of 0. This can cause unexpected game behavior.
Do you want to continue?

data.name: TitleCorruptLot
data.value: WARNING! Unsupported Version.

data.name: MessageCorruptLot
data.value:
If you continue, the LotAdjuster may corrupt your neighborhood or lot. Do not continue unless you have a current backup.
Do you really want to continue?

data.name: NBTitle
data.value: Choose a Neighbourhood:

data.name: NoNBTitle
data.value: No Neighborhoods Available

data.name: NoNeighborhood
data.value:
There are no neighborhoods available in the standard Sims 2 location.
Click Browse... to select a neighborhood.

data.name: NoLotTitle
data.value: No Lots Available

data.name: NoLot
data.value:
There are no lots available in the currently selected neighborhood.
Click Back to select another neighborhood.

data.name: Next
data.value: Next >

data.name: Finish
data.value: Finish

data.name: Back
data.value: < Back

data.name: Browse
data.value: &Browse...

data.name: Advanced
data.value: &Advanced...

data.name: Restart
data.value: &Restart
